Addresses issues like unbounded HTTP requests (CWE-400 equivalent due to resource exhaustion) and prototype pollution vulnerabilities in projection loading (CWE-1321).

01KWM1GA9M73R4STT0KYFD3C05.title: Security Remediation Regression Tests - Wave A
01KWM1GA9M73R4STT0KYFD3C05.description: Regression tests for security fixes, focusing on tenancy enforcement and workspace path containment. Covers unauthorized cross-tenancy data operations and path traversal vulnerabilities (CWE-22) in file system operations and watch intake.

01KWM1GA9PN0ACMNZ1WDPQ1DQ5.title: Server Graceful Shutdown and Force Close Test
01KWM1GA9PN0ACMNZ1WDPQ1DQ5.description: Tests the `close()` method of the HTTP server, ensuring it gracefully shuts down by respecting a grace period before force-closing active connections. It also verifies prompt resolution when no connections are active.

01KWM1GA9QNQPCVSPJ7JKMN3S8.title: Service Command Line Argument Tests for Installation and Uninstallation
01KWM1GA9QNQPCVSPJ7JKMN3S8.description: Tests the command-line argument generation for installing, uninstalling, and checking the status of system services across different platforms (macOS, Linux, Windows). It covers `launchctl`, `systemctl`, `schtasks`, and `sc` commands, including scope and legacy uninstall scenarios.

01KWM1GA9SFPAQKEAB28YX22MN.title: Service Module Tests
01KWM1GA9SFPAQKEAB28YX22MN.description: This file contains comprehensive tests for the `createServiceModule` function, which handles service installation and uninstallation across different operating systems (Linux, macOS, Windows). It uses mock file systems and command runners to simulate system interactions.

01KWM1GA9TD20V259ZVJ6SRMF9.title: Service Platform Resolution Tests
01KWM1GA9TD20V259ZVJ6SRMF9.description: Tests for resolving service plans based on operating system, privilege, and desired scope (user/system). Verifies correct service manager (launchd, systemd, schtasks, sc) and unit path determination across platforms.

01KWM1GA9WS371D4VH29MRT4CW.title: Service Template Generation Tests
01KWM1GA9WS371D4VH29MRT4CW.description: Tests for generating platform-specific service unit files (launchd, systemd, Windows Scheduled Tasks). Verifies correct command execution, restart policies, and argument quoting, ensuring daemon properties are preserved.

01KWM1GA9XMHCR1A4BVXYNHREX.title: StoreBridge Data Consistency and Resilience Tests
01KWM1GA9XMHCR1A4BVXYNHREX.description: Comprehensive tests for the StoreBridge, focusing on write-through ordering, synchronous read consistency from its mirror, and hydration behavior. Critically, it validates fail-soft handling of durable write failures and parking of dependent writes to prevent data corruption.

01KWM1GA9Z3TBM0CFG1VEZR09N.title: Telemetry CheckinService Lifecycle Tests
01KWM1GA9Z3TBM0CFG1VEZR09N.description: Covers the lifecycle of the CheckinService, specifically how it arms and disarms the heartbeat timer during start and stop operations. It also verifies idempotent behavior and fail-soft handling of errors during health sampling.

01KWM1GAA0K1255HSNMJDCN13Y.title: Telemetry CheckinWriter Core Functionality Tests
01KWM1GAA0K1255HSNMJDCN13Y.description: Tests the `CheckinWriter` module, verifying its ability to record service binding times, last seen timestamps, and health status in the telemetry database. It confirms how heartbeats update `last_seen` without affecting `binding_time`, and how new checkins reset `binding_time` upon restart.

01KWM1GAA14B2QPJESS8PZ3N32.title: Telemetry Database Configuration and Security Tests
01KWM1GAA14B2QPJESS8PZ3N32.description: Validates the creation, location, and security permissions of the telemetry SQLite database. Tests cover directory creation, schema initialization (including specific column types and constraints), idempotent re-opening, and setting secure owner-only permissions on POSIX systems.

01KWM1GAA3VG8BTE25HFTRCY8V.title: Telemetry Integration and Concurrent Access Tests
01KWM1GAA3VG8BTE25HFTRCY8V.description: Tests the overall telemetry system's integration, including `createTelemetry` and `createNullTelemetry` behaviors. Critically, it validates that a read-only client can concurrently access telemetry data (check-ins, metrics, logs) from the SQLite database while the main application continues writing, leveraging WAL mode for contention-free access.

01KWM1GAA4PYBKT16HPT5HTDVY.title: Telemetry LogWriter and Redaction Tests
01KWM1GAA4PYBKT16HPT5HTDVY.description: Verifies the `LogWriter`'s ability to append timestamped and leveled log messages to the telemetry database, enforcing retention policies, and actively redacting sensitive information like API keys and bearer tokens. It also tests robust handling of oversized messages and fail-soft behavior for database write failures.

01KWM1GAA6R9CRMW3WZ944TRYT.title: Telemetry Metrics Tests
01KWM1GAA6R9CRMW3WZ944TRYT.description: Tests for the MetricsWriter and its integration with the HiveGraphStore, ensuring metrics are correctly recorded, persisted, and isolated from sensitive data. It covers counter increments, snapshot functionality, fail-soft behavior, and integration with the RegistrationService.

01KWM1GAA7FHBGRYD0DEQDHAB9.title: Test Helper: rmDirWithRetry
01KWM1GAA7FHBGRYD0DEQDHAB9.description: Provides a robust `rmDirWithRetry` function designed to handle OS-level file locking issues (especially on Windows) during test cleanup. This helper ensures temporary directories are reliably removed by retrying the operation with a short backoff.

01KWM1GAA86R0RW8KXE0RNXZV7.title: PostHog Usage Telemetry Emission Tests
01KWM1GAA86R0RW8KXE0RNXZV7.description: Tests the usage telemetry emission system, covering opt-out mechanisms (environment variables like NECTAR_TELEMETRY, DO_NOT_TRACK), data deduplication, distinct ID management, and various fail-soft guarantees for robust operation. It ensures telemetry failures do not impact the application's core functionality or exit codes.

01KWM1GAAAPHRWF2PG18097R08.title: TLSH Fuzzy Fingerprinting and Ladder Integration Tests
01KWM1GAAAPHRWF2PG18097R08.description: Tests the TLSH fuzzy hashing algorithm for content fingerprinting and its integration into the reassociation ladder. It verifies properties like determinism, locality sensitivity, size-aware confidence calculation, and prudent abstention for tiny or unrelated files.

01KWM1GAABSVGPDE1E36FF41K7.title: ULID Nectar Minting Tests
01KWM1GAABSVGPDE1E36FF41K7.description: Tests the ULID minting process for Nectars, focusing on ensuring strict lexicographical orderability and uniqueness even when multiple Nectars are minted within the same millisecond. It verifies the embedded timestamp accuracy and overall validity of minted Nectars.

01KWM1GAACDTJ57WGRTV3CSYSK.title: Wave C Daemon and CLI Integration Tests
01KWM1GAACDTJ57WGRTV3CSYSK.description: Comprehensive integration tests for Wave C features, including the `nectar brood` CLI command, daemon lifecycle for the enricher loop, auto-brooding on empty stores, and /health endpoint status. It also verifies projection loading, inheritance, and the durable enricher store adapter's behavior.

01KWM1GAAE448001F9Z8HWNAK7.title: Wave 2 Features Integration Tests
01KWM1GAAE448001F9Z8HWNAK7.description: Integration tests for Wave 2 features, covering the Deep Lake store's `listLatestDescribedVersions` query, byte-identical projection regeneration, and health reporting for Portkey and embedding providers. It also confirms the unified Portkey header module across relevant components.

01KWM1GAAFRJSTAPA8NPMR6AWG.title: Hiveantennae Worker Job Processing Tests
01KWM1GAAFRJSTAPA8NPMR6AWG.description: Tests the HiveantennaeWorker's job processing logic, including its `runOnce` and `whenIdle` methods, and error handling for job handlers. It verifies that jobs are leased, processed by handlers, completed on success, and failed on errors, with idempotent start/stop controls.

01KWM1GAAHVPCTSHVAJY3YNY0Y.title: TypeScript Configuration
01KWM1GAAHVPCTSHVAJY3YNY0Y.description: This `tsconfig.json` file configures the TypeScript compiler for the project. It targets ES2022, uses NodeNext module resolution, and outputs to the `dist` directory. Strict type-checking and other quality-of-life options are enabled.

01KWM3PCMZ9Q3AHK5WF41XPJ7M.title: .gitkeep for QA folder
01KWM3PCMZ9Q3AHK5WF41XPJ7M.description: This is a placeholder file typically used in version control systems. Its sole purpose is to ensure that an empty directory is tracked. It indicates the presence of a 'qa' folder that may contain quality assurance-related files.

01KWM4PQ315YF847XW6E10K6Z5.title: Projection Loading and Validation
01KWM4PQ315YF847XW6E10K6Z5.description: This module handles loading and validating `nectars.json` projection files, which are treated as untrusted input from version-controlled repositories. It includes defensive checks against oversized files and prototype pollution attacks, and validates the projection's schema and project tenancy.
